_note: Ranking areas separate the data-collection unit from the public diner-facing geography. Local-authority/district areas are useful for operator intelligence; town/neighbourhood areas are the main public product.

areas.description: Town-centre diner guide for Stratford-upon-Avon and nearby walkable/short-trip venues. Intended for public restaurant discovery.
Wider local-authority market view for operator intelligence, including villages, destination pubs, hotels and surrounding settlements.
